tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Oh look. The migrant who stomped a white Swedish man to death was a rapist ... because of course he was. Meaning, if the authorities did their fucking job and deported him, Christian Zedig's children would still have a father.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：哦，看。踩死一名瑞典白人的移民是一名强奸犯……因为他当然是。这意味着，如果当局尽职尽责并将他驱逐出境，克里斯蒂安·泽迪格的孩子们仍然会有父亲。

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: “That was fun, I’ll do it again when I get out,” said the 22-year-old Gambian violent offender after he stabbed a 55-year-old Italian man twenty times. And he will be released again. Perhaps to succeed in killing a European next time.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：“这很有趣，出狱后我会再做一次，”这名 22 岁的冈比亚暴力犯罪者在刺伤一名 55 岁意大利男子 20 刀后说道。他将再次被释放。也许下次就能成功杀死一个欧洲人。

tweets.content: Making sure Cybercab meets the needs of the blind
tweets.translated: 确保 Cyber​​cab 满足盲人的需求

tweets.content: R to @cz_binance: I thought this was a 5-minute photo shoot, for a portrait head shot. So, I wear a Binance polo shirt and jogging pants. I didn't think it would turn into a full body, multiple angle shoot. 🤣 Platon is a master in his art.
tweets.translated: R 致@cz_binance：我认为这是一个 5 分钟的照片拍摄，用于肖像头像拍摄。所以，我穿着币安 Polo 衫和慢跑裤。我没想到它会变成全身多角度拍摄。 🤣 柏拉图是他的艺术大师。

tweets.content: I don't own or know any of these coins. I interact with positive people in our communities. May the best memes win! #BNB
tweets.translated: 我不拥有也不了解这些硬币。我与社区中积极的人互动。愿最好的模因获胜！ #BNB

tweets.content: The cover photo of Freedom of Money book (and my current avatar) was photographed by Platon. It was one funky photo shoot. There was an interesting conversation as well. Watch the video. (Filmed 5 months ago). https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GWRtN6C90KQ
tweets.translated: 《金钱自由》一书的封面照片（以及我现在的头像）是柏拉图拍摄的。这是一张时髦的照片。还有一段有趣的对话。观看视频。 （5个月前拍摄）。 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GWRtN6C90KQ

tweets.content: Wow, $WULF signs a $19B DC lease with Anthropic today. Probably a very positive tailwind for the Neocloud/Colo sector.
tweets.translated: 哇，$WULF 今天与 Anthropic 签署了 $19B DC 租约。对于 Neocloud/Colo 领域来说，这可能是一个非常积极的推动力。

tweets.content: Retail: buys memory, optical, upstream semi names. Media: “retail bubble drives AI meme stock bubble higher”. Institutions that do the exact same thing, with the exact same names: Media: “Institutions make record profits by betting on what goes inside AI Server Racks”.
tweets.translated: 零售：购买内存、光学、上游半成品。媒体：“零售泡沫推动人工智能模因股票泡沫走高”。做同样事情、名称完全相同的机构： 媒体：“机构通过押注人工智能服务器机架内的内容来赚取创纪录的利润”。

tweets.content: I find it hard for any bears to defend against this humanoid bull case.
tweets.translated: 我发现任何熊都很难抵御这种人形牛的情况。
